grade_notes: Excellent blog post covering 4 distinct developer-specific benefits (deep work, global opportunities, energy cycles, work-life integration) with clear reasoning and examples. Well-structured with H1/H2 headings, professional engaging prose, no errors. File correctly named. Word count estimated 550-580 (within 400-600 acceptable range, slightly over ideal 450-550).

history.summary: [授意中] 明确政策目标：撰写500字远程工作益处博客文章并落盘blog_post.md；红线：内容须聚焦软件开发者群体、字数严格控制在400-600区间、禁止偏离主题的通用远程工作讨论。
